_comment: X / Twitter accounts polled by xTradePoller (Phase 4.57). All accounts default to QUARANTINED — Action tab + Discord display only, no SIM auto-fire until 30-trade hit-rate is graded.
_format: Each account has style ('contract' for Raven-style direct contracts, 'bias' for Sniper-style narrative, 'mixed' for both), pollIntervalMin, and notes.

accounts.notes: Direct contract posts: '$TICKER MM/DD STRIKEc/p @ PRICE'. Also posts trim/exit lifecycle as 'from X.XX SPTP'. ~20yr trader.
Narrative bias posts with PT + levels. Sometimes drops specific contracts. Has monthly performance post pattern.

_promotionRule._note: After 30 graded trades from a source: ≥50% win rate → manual unquarantine via /api/source/promote · <40% → auto-mute · 40-50% → stays quarantined indefinitely.
